title: The Movie Star Liquor Taste Test
format: For Amanda's birthday, Sean, Amanda, and producer Bobby taste their way through a garage full of celebrity liquor brands, tequila to bourbon to wine to beer, and track each star's film career between sips.

films.title: Schizopolis
films.note: cited for Soderbergh's contempt for the 'commercialized world,' which is also how they read his own liquor website.

films.title: Fast X
films.note: the post-credits cameo Sean calls 'the Fast X stinger,' read as sad given the reported Vin Diesel rift.

films.title: Black Adam
films.note: the 'new era' Johnson was said to be launching before it underperformed.

films.title: Red Notice
films.note: grouped with Black Adam as part of the recent run of Johnson vehicles that haven't landed.

films.title: Father Stu
films.note: cited as evidence Wahlberg has 'moved primarily into Netflix territory'; neither host has actually seen it.

films.title: Mississippi Grind
films.note: Sean's pick for Reynolds's best performance: 'he's phenomenal.'

films.title: Definitely, Maybe
films.note: Sean recaps the whole plot (Isla Fisher, Elizabeth Banks, Rachel Weisz) before catching himself.

films.title: Free Guy
films.note: 'stinks,' Sean says, though he's ready to forgive Reynolds for it.

films.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
films.note: referred to on air by its working title 'Deadpool 3'; Sean says he's looking forward to it.

films.title: The Hateful Eight
films.note: cited alongside Justified (TV) as proof of Goggins's range.

films.title: The Intern
films.note: Amanda's origin story as a Ringer intern: Sean sent her an IMDb pull quote with no time code, so she watched the whole movie to find it.

films.title: The Irishman
films.note: Sean's counter-pick: Anna Paquin's near-silent role, and the 'you're not seeing the big picture' line he wants clipped from it.

segments.heading: Sofia — Francis Ford and Sofia Coppola

films.title: The Godfather Part III
films.note: the wine is named for the Immobiliare subplot, which Amanda confirms is a real homage.

films.title: Rumble Fish
films.note: comes up because Sofia Coppola put it on her Sight and Sound ballot; Sean's a fan.

segments.heading: Aveline — Cameron Diaz and Katherine Power

films.title: Sex Tape
films.note: named, half-jokingly, as Diaz's last movie.

films.title: Annie
films.note: the remake; 'if that was her swan song, that's not ideal.'

films.title: The Counselor
films.note: Amanda's actual pick for a great late Diaz performance: 'everyone's really trying their best.'

films.title: Shrek
films.note: brought up in passing alongside her other credits.

films.title: Back in Action
films.note: her return alongside Jamie Foxx, whose health problems have the hosts unsure of the movie's status.

segments.heading: Margalicious Margarita — Vanessa Hudgens, Ashley Benson & Rosario Dawson

films.title: Spring Breakers
films.note: Hudgens and Benson are 'two-fourths' of its cast, the hosts note.

films.title: Top Gun: Maverick
films.note: the source of Bobby's Halloween mustache; he went as Goose to his wife's Maverick.

segments.heading: Broken Skull American Lager — Stone Cold Steve Austin

films.title: The Expendables
films.note: Sean is genuinely surprised to learn Austin was in it.

films.title: The Longest Yard
films.note: the Adam Sandler remake; Austin's other credited film role.
